name: New York Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to New York - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: New York State Dept of Health

address.description: Prometric, NY Nurse Aide Program, 7941 Corporate Dr., Nottingham, MD 21090

renewalCycle: Every 2 years (based on documented work activity)

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the New York CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The NYS Nurse Aide exam is administered by Prometric. Register at prometric.com/nurseaide/ny.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a New York CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Prometric NY Nurse Aide Registry portal or call the 24/7 IVR line at 1-800-918-8818.

mainEntity.name: How do I transfer my CNA to New York?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contact Prometric at the NY Nurse Aide Portal to apply for reciprocity.

mainEntity.name: How long does New York CNA endorsement take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. Contact the registry for current timelines.
